meta.intent: Create real triage between the lower puppy that is close to the water and the upper-right route that vine is about to worsen.
meta.expectedPath: Open the lower-left pocket first by clearing the B cluster that clips the vine beside the water-near puppy, use the A cluster to finish that rescue, then pivot into the more expensive upper-right pocket.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player tunnels on the vine-threatened upper side first, spends actions protecting that lane, and loses the lower puppy to the rising water.
meta.whatItProves: The prototype can create triage, not just obstacle management.
meta.notes: The rebuilt start is dense enough for mid-onboarding while preserving two readable pockets. The lower route intentionally has a fast vine-clipping opener; the upper-right route carries more blockers so tunneling there spends the action budget before the water-near rescue.
